questionHtml:
With which do most acids react?

   I. sodium hydrogen carbonate
   II. magnesium
   III. calcium sulfate

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: With which do most acids react? I. sodium hydrogen carbonate II. magnesium III. calcium sulfate A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?
Reactivity 3.1.7—Acids react with bases in neutralization reactions. Formulate equations for the reactions between acids and metal oxides, metal hydroxides, hydrogencarbonates and carbonates.
